text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I think we need some special things for the room.
You know, to make it really groovy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Time for some redecorating then! What would
really liven up this joint?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We should make it just like the castle interior
from Princess Fighter, so in other words, striking
and elegant!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Let's not forget about practicality as well!
Something that could completely transform an
ordinary ol' dorm room...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If we're going for a complete makeover, then I
think we need to focus on the floor and walls. The
curtains and carpet might be a start!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The carpet, huh? Oh, that reminds me that I've
always wanted a sumo ring carpet for my room! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
A sumo ring? Admiring one's own culture is
another way to go global, so I get ya!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Mhmm, and I could also practice sumo in my very
own room!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Spectacular! As a princess, training is also
important. I think I'll take that idea as well!
